evals.prompt: Check the browser console for errors
evals.expected_output: The skill uses Sweetlink to connect to the browser and retrieve console logs
expectations: Uses Sweetlink WebSocket or logs command to read browser console
Reports any console errors found or confirms zero errors

evals.prompt: Any console errors after my changes?
evals.expected_output: The skill checks the browser console for new errors via Sweetlink
expectations: Triggers the console check flow via Sweetlink
Reports errors, warnings, or confirms clean console
Does not run TypeScript or lint checks

evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger console-check-sweetlink. TypeScript errors are handled by quick-typecheck.
expectations: No Sweetlink or browser commands are executed
